title: Cross-Domain Invariance PASS: 3 structural invariants across 6 domains

invariant_surrogate_survival.description: QCI survives all surrogate null tests in every domain

invariant_independent_info.description: QCI provides independent information beyond domain-specific baselines (partial r > 0 or dR2 > 0)

invariant_domain_general.description: Same observer architecture (topographic -> QA states -> T-operator -> QCI) applies without domain-specific tuning
